zh.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes是Thierry de Pottes和Berthe Lambersart的兒子，出生。他和Josine Thieulain至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes是Thierry de Pottes和Berthe Lambersart的儿子，出生。他和Josine Thieulain至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pottes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Alvaro, Ana, Jorge, Alberto, Amancio, Anselmo, Avelino, Belmira, Carlos, Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Serafim.
Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of numerousplaces in Portugal named Pontes, from the plural of ponte‘bridge’.

variants.name: Puentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Alicia, Julio, Luis, Roberto, Angel, Guadalupe.
Spanish: habitational name from any of various places called Puentes, from the plural of puente ‘bridge’.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes was born as the son of Thierry de Pottes and Berthe Lambersart. He had at least 1 son with Josine Thieulain.

fr.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes est né, fils de Thierry de Pottes et Berthe Lambersart. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Josine Thieulain.

de.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes wurde, als Sohn von Thierry de Pottes und Berthe Lambersart geboren. Er hatte mit Josine Thieulain mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes è nato il come figlio di Thierry de Pottes e Berthe Lambersart. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Josine Thieulain.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard II de PottesはThierry de PottesとBerthe Lambersartの息子として生まれた。彼はJosine Thieulainとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes(은)는 Thierry de Pottes(와)과 Berthe Lambersart의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Josine Thieulain(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes nasceu filho de Thierry de Pottes e Berthe Lambersart. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Josine Thieulain.

ru.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes родился. Его родителей звали Thierry de Pottes и Berthe Lambersart. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Josine Thieulain.

es.lifeSummary: Gerard II de Pottes nació como hijo de Thierry de Pottes y Berthe Lambersart. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Josine Thieulain.
